scenario.name: Basic UAS responder
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];tag=3 To: sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port]; Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Require: replaces Replaces: 82f45c59640d7d78e6290b28539f4f61;from-tag=2;to-tag=1 Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687640 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/AVP 0 8 101 a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000/1 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000

ACK sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 [last_Via:] [last_From:] [last_To:] [last_Call-ID:] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]> Max-Forwards: 70 [routes] Subject: Performance Test Content-Length: 0
